default.title: Horizon Chatekinoloje | Mapulogalamu a Enterprise, Mtambo, ndi AI
default.description: Horizon Tech imapanga ndikupereka mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito, njira za AI, zomangamanga zamtambo, ndi mankhwala a digito kwa magulu ofunitsitsa.

home.title: Horizon Chatekinoloje | Njira Zomangamanga Zomwe Zimakula
home.description: Mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito, AI / ML, zomangamanga zamtambo, ndi kupereka kwa IoT kwa magulu apadziko lonse lapansi.

about.title: About Horizon Tech | Ntchito ya Kampani ndi Gulu
about.description: Phunzirani za Horizon Tech, ntchito yathu, ndi momwe timaperekera njira zamakono zapamwamba.

team.title: Gulu | Utsogoleri wa Horizon Tech ndi Akatswiri
team.description: Kumanani ndi mainjiniya ndi atsogoleri omwe akumanga mapulogalamu ogwira ntchito ndi nsanja zamtambo ku Horizon Tech.

careers.title: Ntchito | Pangani ndi Horizon Tech
careers.description: Fufuzani maudindo otseguka ndikukulitsa ntchito yanu ndi gulu la zomangamanga la Horizon Tech.

contact.title: Lumikizanani ndi Horizon Tech | Yambani Polojekiti Yanu
contact.description: Lumikizanani ndi Horizon Tech kuti mukambirane polojekiti yanu, zosowa zaukadaulo, ndi nthawi yoperekera.

caseStudies.title: Maphunziro a Milandu | Zotsatira za Horizon Tech
caseStudies.description: Werengani maphunziro a kasitomala ndi zotsatira zoperekedwa ndi Horizon Tech m'mafakitale.

blog.title: Blog | Horizon Tech Insights
blog.description: Chidziwitso chaukadaulo, maphunziro operekera, ndi chitsogozo cha zomangamanga kuchokera ku Horizon Tech.

education.title: Maphunziro | Horizon Tech Learning Resources
education.description: Zitsogozo, maumboni, ndi zipangizo zophunzirira zaukadaulo kuchokera ku Horizon Tech.

support.title: Thandizo | Horizon Chatekinoloje
support.description: Pezani zothandizira zothandizira ndi njira zolumikizirana ndi ntchito za Horizon Tech.

privacy.title: Mfundo Zachinsinsi | Horizon Chatekinoloje
privacy.description: Werengani ndondomeko yachinsinsi ya Horizon Tech ndi kudzipereka kwa chitetezo cha deta.

terms.title: Terms of Service | Horizon Chatekinoloje
terms.description: Werengani mawu a Horizon Tech a webusaiti yathu ndi mautumiki.

profile.title: Mbiri | Horizon Chatekinoloje
profile.description: Sayang'anirani mbiri yanu ya Horizon Tech, zoikamo, ndi tsatanetsatane wa akaunti.

firstTimeSetup.title: Kukhazikitsa Nthawi Yoyamba | Horizon Chatekinoloje
firstTimeSetup.description: Malizitsani kukhazikitsa akaunti yoyamba kuti mupitilize mu Horizon Tech.

forgotPassword.title: Mawu achinsinsi oyiwala | Horizon Chatekinoloje
forgotPassword.description: Bwezeretsani mwayi wopita ku akaunti yanu ya Horizon Tech.

resetPassword.title: Bwezeretsani Mawu achinsinsi | Horizon Chatekinoloje
resetPassword.description: Pangani mawu achinsinsi atsopano a akaunti yanu ya Horizon Tech.

confirmEmail.title: Tsimikizirani Imelo | Horizon Chatekinoloje
confirmEmail.description: Tsimikizirani adilesi yanu ya imelo kuti muyambitse akaunti yanu ya Horizon Tech.

admin.title: Gulu la Admin | Horizon Chatekinoloje
admin.description: Malo ogwirira ntchito oyang'anira kasamalidwe ka nsanja ya Horizon Tech.

unauthorized.title: Zosaloledwa | Horizon Chatekinoloje
unauthorized.description: Pakali pano mulibe mwayi wopeza tsamba ili la Horizon Tech.

services.title: Ntchito | Horizon Chatekinoloje
services.description: Fufuzani ntchito za Horizon Tech mu zomangamanga zamapulogalamu, AI, mtambo, DevOps, ndi kusintha kwa digito.

innovationLab.title: Innovation Lab | Horizon Chatekinoloje
innovationLab.description: Onani zoyeserera za Horizon Tech ndi ma prototypes mu AI ndi zomangamanga zogwiritsidwa ntchito.

authCallback.title: Kulowa | Horizon Chatekinoloje
authCallback.description: Kumaliza kulowa kotetezeka kwa akaunti yanu ya Horizon Tech.
